title: Provectus Biofuels to Advance Renewable Jet Fuel Project in Canada
content: Provectus Biofuels Inc. (â€œProvectusâ€) has signed a Letter of Intent with the Town of Vegreville to build a biofuel facility that will convert the regionâ€™s abundant wheat straw into Renewable Jet Fuel (â€œRJFâ€). The project will create new income opportunities for farmers, reduce air pollution by replacing crop residue burning, and produce biochar to improve soil health, conserve water, and sequester carbon, while supporting federal and provincial clean energy and sustainability goals.
